title: Build YouTube-like video sharing platform

requirements.text: Create a backend data model for storing video metadata including title, description, upload date, duration, view count, and uploader information
acceptanceCriteria: Video records can be created with all required metadata fields
Each video has a unique identifier
Uploader information is associated with each video

requirements.text: Implement video upload functionality allowing users to upload video files with title and description
acceptanceCriteria: Users can select and upload video files
Upload form includes fields for title and description
Uploaded videos are stored and retrievable
Upload progress is shown to the user

requirements.text: Build a video player interface with playback controls including play, pause, volume, and fullscreen options
acceptanceCriteria: Video player displays uploaded videos
Play and pause controls work correctly
Volume control is functional
Fullscreen mode can be toggled
Video progress bar shows current position

requirements.text: Create a video listing page displaying all uploaded videos with thumbnails, titles, view counts, and upload dates
acceptanceCriteria: All videos are displayed in a grid or list layout
Each video shows thumbnail, title, views, and date
Clicking a video navigates to the video player page

requirements.text: Implement user authentication system using Internet Identity for uploading and managing videos
acceptanceCriteria: Users can authenticate using Internet Identity
Only authenticated users can upload videos
User identity is associated with uploaded videos

requirements.text: Add video sharing functionality with shareable links for each video
acceptanceCriteria: Each video has a unique shareable URL
Share button generates a copyable link
Shared links load the correct video player page

requirements.text: Implement a comments system allowing users to leave comments on videos
acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated users can post comments on videos
Comments display with username and timestamp
Comments are visible to all users viewing the video

requirements.text: Create a subscription system allowing users to subscribe to other users' channels
acceptanceCriteria: Users can subscribe to content creators
Subscription count is displayed on user profiles
Users can view a list of their subscriptions

requirements.text: Build a video recommendation system showing suggested videos based on viewing history or popularity
acceptanceCriteria: Recommended videos are shown on the home page
Recommendations update based on user activity
Popular videos are prioritized for new users

requirements.text: Implement view count tracking that increments when a video is watched
acceptanceCriteria: View count increments when video playback starts
View counts persist across sessions
View counts are displayed on video listings and player

requirements.text: Create user profile pages showing uploaded videos and subscriber count
acceptanceCriteria: Each user has a profile page accessible via their username
Profile displays all videos uploaded by that user
Subscriber count is visible on the profile

requirements.text: Design a modern, engaging video platform interface with a bold visual theme using vibrant colors, clean typography, and an intuitive layout that emphasizes video content discovery
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme is vibrant and distinct from standard blue/purple
Typography is clear and readable across all components
Layout prioritizes video thumbnails and discovery
Visual style is consistent across all pages

requirements.text: Render generated platform branding images and icons as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
acceptanceCriteria: Generated logo is displayed in the navigation header
Platform icon is used as favicon
Images are served from the frontend public directory

constraints: Video files must be stored and managed within the Internet Computer's storage capabilities
Authentication must use Internet Identity only
No external video hosting services or CDNs can be used
Real-time features like live streaming are not supported

required: Modern video platform logo with play button element in vibrant colors (logo.dim_256x256.png)
Platform favicon icon with recognizable video symbol (favicon.dim_64x64.png)
